tickets.subject: Ahora puedo decir "Ella perdió su impermeable cuando estábamos en el bosque" en inglés. ¡Gracias Duolingo!
tickets.raw_subject: Ahora puedo decir "Ella perdió su impermeable cuando estábamos en el bosque" en inglés. ¡Gracias Duolingo!
tickets.description:
Ahora puedo decir "Ella perdió su impermeable cuando estábamos en el bosque" en inglés. ¡Gracias Duolingo!
Yo traduje: Ella perdió su impermeable ........en la floresta.  Y Duo me corrige: Ella perdió su impermeable...en la "foresta" .  Me cambia " floresta " ( en español se dice floresta , con l .) por" foresta " ( Así se dice en italiano no en español)  " y me califica el ejercicio con rojo, como si el error hubiera sido mío! (Se puede comprobar con cualquier diccionario sea español que italiano o en uno con ambos idiomas.)
Duolingo debe cuidar más estos pequeños deslices que malogran su imagen.
Los alumnos podemos errar,estamos aprendiendo y cometemos muchos errores ,pero quién enseña no debe enseñar palabras o frases equivocadas, las oraciones de muestra deberían ser comprobadamente correctas, no tiradas por allí a como salgan como sucede algunas veces.
Gracias, y perdón por el reniego pero Duolingo lo quisiera ver perfecto!

Sería una fantastica idea que incorporáran  un Chatbot en la aplicación , para así facilitar y ayudar a las personas que se encuentre en una situación real con un hablante, o simplemente para la practica, obviamente que sea un chat el cual vaya acorde con los temas aprendidos en cada  etapa.
Por otro lado otra  sujerencia es que por favor agreguen lo mas pronto posible el idioma  japones para personas que sean de habla hispana y que posean un dispositivo Android , ya que me he podido dar cuenta de que a muchas personas les interesa este idioma ( incluyendome).
Espero que mis sugerencias sean de su agrado, ya que las hago para mejorar aun mas esta hermosa aplicación.
Muchas gracias por la atención prestada.

tickets.subject: Tinycards Feedback
tickets.description:
I am an active user on Memrise and run several popular courses, so I wanted to highlight some major advantages I feel Memrise holds over tinycards:
Ability to add alternate answers.
Ability to add audio.
Control over the size of learning units.

I'm also a bit curious as to whether creators will be able to group related courses, as Duolingo has for the courses that cover Duolingo course vocabulary. I would find this very helpful.

The creator tools are also quite limited in tinycards, though I'm unsure if that could change without a vast rework.

tickets.subject: Android feedback
tickets.description:
I am highly dissatisfied with this service because I had a 31 day streak and was about to play so I wouldn't lose my streak after it strikes midnight (it is 11:36 pm at time of writing) and I get a pop up saying I lost my streak, which I worked hard for! I remember playing yesterday, and I didn't miss a day, so I don't understand what happened. I don't want to pay the $2.99 to repair my streak because that's a lot of money for a game. Any way I could get a free repair for my streak? Or just take all my lingots away to repair it? I am so sad that I "lost it", even though I remember playing. Please, just repair it... I had a personal goal to keep that number raising, and now that it's gone, I just want to cry. I worked SO HARD! I don't have the motivation to use 31 more days to get it back because now I have to deal with the sadness of remembering that I "lost my streak". If there's anything you can do to give my streak back, I'll take it and rate 5 stars on the app store for being so considerate with people. Thanks for your time

-A saddened costumer

-------------------

Cuando tienes que repetir la oración en inglés,  el estudiante debe activar el micrófono y hablar.
Pero mi nena descubrió que si activaba el micrófono y luego hacia click en la voz interlocutora de la aplicación para que le repitiera la oración, la aplicación le escuchaba y le daba visto bueno, pasando así rápido está parte del aprendizaje.
Espero puedan corregir este error, gracias

Olá,
Parece-me que houve algum problema no sistema do Duolingo entre ontem e hoje.
Eu tinha 141 dias de ofensiva ontem quando por um descuido deixei de completar a minha meta diária.
Ocorre que eu estava equipado com o bloqueio de ofensivas, justamente para me proteger caso algum lapso assim ocorresse.
Agora notei que meus dias de ofensiva voltaram a 0 e recebi uma oferta para recuperar meu progresso por R$ 31,99.
Não me parece justo isso.
Para que serve então o bloqueio de ofensivas se esse recurso não funciona quando se precisa dele?
Isso me deixou muito decepcionado e chateado.
Francisco

tickets.description:
Добрый день. Когда закрепляю пройденные уроки, в конце мне показывается что шкала прочности заполнена и начисляются очки опыта. Но когда я выхожу в главный раздел, шкала прочности у некоторых остается на том же месте. Это случается не постоянно, но достаточно часто.

------------------
Отправлено с https://www.duolingo.com/help

tickets.subject: Feedback
tickets.description:
I just wanted to weigh in on the new health feature. It really counter acts my learning process. I haven't been able to advance in the language at all since the update. I keep getting small things wrong like a typo, autocorrect issue, or forgetting an article. I really wish that you would switch back to the other way. Now I just feel defeated trying to learn instead of hopeful like before. I don't feel like I am accomplishing anything because I have to quit a lesson to restore health. 

I also don't have the time to spend to restore health. Then go back and hope to complete the lesson in the same evening. I liked Duolingo because it was convenient to my schedule and the time I had available. However that is no longer the case. 

My biggest issue is the defeat I feel when I run out of health.  I am very disappointed in the app now....


Username: Marisa885687
App version: 5.1.0.18
Device model: iPhone
OS version: 10.2.1
UI language: en
Learning language: ga
logs.txt

tickets.raw_subject: WG: bitte auf deutsche Sprache einstellen
tickets.description:
Das ist jetzt  - glaube ich – die dritte mail, die ich Ihnen zuschicke. Aus Versehen habe ich kürzlich die armenische Sprache als Muttersprache gewählt und jetzt erscheint permanent alles in armenischer Sprache, ohne dass ich erkennen kann, wie ich wieder auf die deutsche Sprache zurückkomme.

 

Von: arnopaessens@hotmail.com
Gesendet: Sonntag, 23. April 2017 14:26
An: 'Duolingo'; 'Duolingo Update'
Betreff: AW: Wir vermissen dich!

 

Solange die Einstiegseiten weiterhin in armenischer Sprache erscheinen, werde ich nicht mehr an Duolingo teilnehmen können. Die armenische Sprache wurde versehentlich ausgewählt.

 

Von: Duolingo [mailto:no-reply@duolingo.com]
Gesendet: Samstag, 22. April 2017 21:09

Möchtest du noch Französisch lernen? Mache jetzt eine 5-minütige Übung!

Leg wieder los!

tickets.subject: Ahora puedo decir "¿Podrías darme un aventón?" en inglés. ¡Gracias Duolingo!
tickets.raw_subject: Ahora puedo decir "¿Podrías darme un aventón?" en inglés. ¡Gracias Duolingo!
tickets.description:
Ahora puedo decir "¿Podrías darme un aventón?" en inglés. ¡Gracias Duolingo!

Qué significa aventón?¡ Esto es pura jerga de barrio!
¿Podrías llevarme? ¿ podrías darme un pasaje? Sería lo correcto.
Supongo que aventón derive de "aventar" que según mi diccionario Larousse quiere decir : echar al viento, tirar con fuerza. Pero "aventón "para Larousse no existe y para Espasa tampoco. Las palabras inventadas suelen ser divertidas entre amigos, pero deberían quedar al margen en los cursos de idiomas. Esta es mi opinión que puede no coincidir con la vuestra.
Gracias.

tickets.subject: Breaking my Streak
tickets.description:
I'm in Australia
I very deliberately did my Dutch study on Sunday morning 30 points minimum (28 May 2017) - and I think this has happened twice - this morning I am notified that my streak is broken - I also noticed that my other account - Whiskers434510 (Italian) - has points for yesterday even though I have not studied Italian for a while - It looks like the points slop across. I very deliberately opened a second account for Italian so that I could just do it for fun - if I felt like it - my serious study is Dutch. I have paid twice to keep my streak but am thoroughly cheesed off about it since I am 98% certain that my streak was not broken yesterday! The photos show that the points slop across even thought I have different email accounts and account names. See screen shots.
I have just noticed that the Lingot message on my Italian profile shows that I won 20 points for reaching my 200 days streak - pretty amazing when I opened the account less than a month ago!!

tickets.subject: Üdv! Mint moderátort szeretném kérdezni az angolró...
tickets.raw_subject: Üdv! Mint moderátort szeretném kérdezni az angolró...
tickets.description:
Üdv! Mint moderátort szeretném kérdezni az angolról: feleségem angol tanár, és mivel van most sok tanítványa, ezért elkezdtem egyelőre a Duo-n tanulni a nyelvet, ami tetszik. Egyrészt a régi ismereteket felfrissíti, másrészt jönnek azért új dolgok is. Viszont lenne a feleségemnek a haladásommal kapcsolatosan kérdése. Az érdekelné, hogy bár szerinte nagyon jó a felépítés, de jönnek egymás után a különböző igeidők, nyelvtan, stb. De amikor javarészt az elején átveszi a dolgokat a Duo, akkor miket kell majd csinálni/gyakorolni mondjuk a 3. hónaptól? Milyen a 6. hónaptól az anyaga a duónak? Bele lehetne ebbe kicsit látni? Mert azt mondja, akkor felkészülne rá kicsit, hogyan segítsen nekem. Köszi előre is a választ!

------------------
Beküldve innen: https://www.duolingo.com/help

Jade

tickets.subject: Bug/Issue
tickets.description:
I've been using the DuoLingo app for about a year now and I recently received an update on it. I now have a health-bar which goes down if I get an answer wrong on a lesson. If I lose all my health, I then have to pay in the in-game currency or £5.00 to get my health back. Either that or I can do a lesson or wait 4 hours to get a minuscule amount of health back.

I really don't like this new feature as it alienates me from wanting to learn my chosen languages. It feels like a ploy to make more money out of me (despite many sponsored adverts I assume you make money from) whilst simultaneously game-ifying my app. Is there any way I can have the old version (without health) installed on my phone? 

It doesn't feel like a lesson to me anymore. More a waste of my time.

Also, since the update, there has been an issue with filling up the bars to gold. If I continue straight on to practice more, the bars don't fill up. I have to quit the lesson, then go back into it if I want to fill my bars up.

tickets.subject: Strengthen skills in the main page keeps cycling through the basic categories
tickets.raw_subject: Strengthen skills in the main page keeps cycling through the basic categories
tickets.description: This has been going on for more than 3 months now, due to this, it has decreased my fluency from 49% (not sure since it has been a long time now) to 7%, plus it is impossible to do reviews using the strengthen skills in the main page to strengthen newly learned categories since it only cycles through the basic categories while is ignores the more advanced ones. I am aware that we can just strengthen each category manually but this is very troublesome and time-consuming. Plenty of users are having this issue and we're hoping that this would be rectified as soon as possible. If there was a change in the system's algorithm, the previous one was a lot better.

tickets.subject: Android feedback
tickets.description:
Hey duolingo,

I love your courses and the app. I would like 2 suggestions for duolingo.

1. Removing capital letters. I know the beginning of sentence should start with a capital letter but sometimes it gives away how you should start a sentence. That takes away the challenge sometimes.

2. The strenghting your skill feature seems to be focusing on only one course at the time. I would be great i think if it would takes a few of the weakest parts and overal greadually raises their strength instead for fullfilling only one course at the time. Cuz when you didnt use the app in a while its really discouraging to redo every course over and over again.

This what i noticed over the year whilr using duolingo. You people are great for providing this! Thank you, graciacias dziękuję.

Riyaz van Wegberg

tickets.subject:
Olá pessoal,

Eu tenho uma dúvida quanto ao WAS GO...
tickets.raw_subject:
Olá pessoal,

Eu tenho uma dúvida quanto ao WAS GO...
tickets.description:
Olá pessoal,

Eu tenho uma dúvida quanto ao WAS GOING TO e WOULD e encontrei o tópico de vocês https://www.duolingo.com/comment/15817457/Qual-a-diferen%C3%A7a-entre-would-verb-e-was-were-going-to-verb mas não me respondeu totalmente me dúvida, e no tópico não encontrei nenhum lugar para fazer um comentário. Por isso estou usando esse canal, para você me ajudarem, se possível.

Se quiserem colocar esse minha dúvida abaixo lá no tópico e responderem lá, tudo bem.

Na língua portuguesa, existem dois tempos verbais no passado (Pretérito Perfeito e Pretérito Imperfeito), e também existem dois tempos verbais no futuro (Futuro Simples e Futuro do Pretérito).

A questão aonde eu quero chegar diz respeito aos tempos verbais Pretérito Imperfeito (-ia) e o Futuro do Pretérito (-ria).

Na língua inglesa, são representados pelos auxiliares WAS GOING TO (-ia) e WOULD (-ria). No entanto, vendo vários artigos de inglês pela internet, só encontrei explicações que diz que o tempo verbal Futuro do Pretérito (Future of the Past) possuem duas formas de se expressar, que é WOULD e WAS GOING TO.

E é aí que vem a minha dúvida... na língua inglesa, o "Pretérito Imperfeito" não existe? 
Eu sempre achei que  WAS GOING TO (-ia) era o Pretérito Imperfeito, e o WOULD (-ria) era o Futuro do Pretérito. Mas estou errado, pois na língua inglesa eles consideração que o WAS GOING TO e WOULD  fazem parte do mesmo tempo verbal (Futuro do Pretérito), é isso?

E Futuro do Pretérito em inglês pode ser dito, tanto "Future of the Past" quanto "Future of the Preterite"?

Agradeço a informação.

------------------
Enviado de: https://www.duolingo.com/help

tickets.subject: Strength meters not increasing
tickets.description: I just practiced a skill ('Occupation' in Spanish) a few minutes ago and, judging by the information on the 'words' page, didn't receive credit for even one word as a result of it. I'm pretty sure that I only got one question wrong at most.  I think I completed the practice around 7:53AM Pacific time, the attached screenshot just shows the absence of any credit for it on the 'words' page. In general, I've recently noticed that frequently when I practice an older skill (by clicking on it directly), I get credit for far fewer words than I do when practicing a new skill or using the 'Strengthen Skills' button. I am using Internet Explorer (11.0.42) on a PC. Thanks!

tickets.subject: Health system doesn't foster learning and actively inhibits it
tickets.raw_subject: Health system doesn't foster learning and actively inhibits it
tickets.description:
My account was recently converted to using gems and the new health system. While I understand your goal of trying to monetize the whole thing - I'm extremely opposed to the way you have implemented health. I created a forum posting on it - https://www.duolingo.com/comment/22790413 to get others input on it as well as share my experience. General consensus is that it inhibits learning when trying to learn a new lesson.  Also - even though you are trying to monetize, this is not an effective way to do it. Your Economics make it way too expensive to pay to get health back and I sincerely hope people aren't stupid enough to reward your attempts to candy crush ify the app in this fashion. 

Here are some reasons it's against helping you learn: (more reasons are avail from other users in the forum post) On iOS you are often tested on a new word before you are even given the definition of it, so unless you look it up elsewhere first (ruining the experience of trying to learn within the app) you will get dinged for a health point by getting it wrong. iOS doesn't help you with grammar either, including word order. You often have to fail a few times at putting a sentence together before you get it right. The health system shuts you down and now you have to switch to practicing something completely different which doesn't help you learn the new vocabulary and lesson. It's ruined the experience for me completely. 

my kids want to use duolingo but the health system makes it untenable for them because they get punished for trying to learn and getting it wrong. If you're actually trying to encourage learning I preferred the old hearts method where you couldn't finish a lesson until you got enough right. While that was occasionally frustrating it at least had the correct goal in mind.

tickets.subject: Timezones cause lost wager
tickets.description: I normally live in Switzerland, but I recently travelled to the US. My phone's timezone was Eastern Time, while my computer was still in UTC+2. I logged onto Duolingo on my computer and was told that I lost my streak (and thus my wager), even though this was before midnight Eastern Time. I then stopped using the computer and switched to my phone, which said my streak was still in effect. I completed my studies and maintained my streak, but the wager was still lost. I realize that this is a nuanced bug, but your users tend to be travelers, so you might want to look into it.

tickets.subject: Re: Fwd: Sample a Duolingo English Test at NAFSA
tickets.raw_subject: Re: Fwd: Sample a Duolingo English Test at NAFSA
tickets.description:
Dear Luis,

Greetings from PUC-Rio!

Thank you for your message. Unfortunately, the PUC-Rio representatives have no time-slot available to schedule a meeting at NAFSA 2017 Conference.

If you are interested, please, feel welcome to visit the Brazilian booth # 2701.

Kind regards,

Christine Duarte 


Should you need further assistance, please, do not hesitate to contact us.

Kind Regards,

Christine Duarte

Coordenação Central de Cooperação Internacional - CCCI
International Cooperation Central Coordination Office
PUC-Rio
Rua Marquês de São Vicente, 225
Ed. Pe. Leonel Franca, 8º andar
22 453-900 Rio de Janeiro - RJ - Brasil
Tel: (55 21) 3527-1577 / 3527-1578
Fax: (55 21) 3527-1094
E-mail: incominginf2-ccci@puc-rio.br
http://www.puc-rio.br/ccci



-------- Mensagem encaminhada --------

Assunto:  Sample a Duolingo English Test at NAFSA
Data:  Fri, 26 May 2017 09:32:37 -0600
De:  Luis Von Ahn, CEO <luis@duolingo.com>
Responder a:  luis@duolingo.com
Para:  incoming@puc-rio.br



Sample a Duolingo English Test at NAFSA

 

Hola Linda,

Estamos entusiasmados que PUC - Rio asistirá la próxima semana al evento NAFSA 2017. Nos encantaría conectar con ustedes para contarles como universidades prestigiosas, empresas y gobiernos están utilizando el Duolingo English Test (http://go.duolingo.com/e/208162/edu/5x8cn/180063273)  para obtener el panorama completo del nivel de inglés de sus profesionales.

Los invitamos a que nos visiten en nuestro booth (2217) (http://go.duolingo.com/e/208162/NAFSA-DET/5x8cq/180063273)  para una demostración del examen. Así mismo, nos gustaría ofrecerles un demo gratis para que PUC - Rio comience desde ya mismo a recibir resultados oficiales Duolingo. Tenemos disponibilidad limitada, puede reservar su cita aquí (http://go.duolingo.com/e/208162/meetings-DET/5x8cs/180063273) .

Utilizando la mejor tecnología, el Duolingo English Test fue creado científicamente para el candidato moderno.

* Accesible: El examen puede ser tomado en cualquier parte del mundo por tan solo US $49 y no representa un costo para las instituciones
 
* Eficiente: Tiene una duración de tan solo 30 minutos y los resultados están disponibles en las primeras 48 horas
 
* Seguro: Cuenta con supervisión remota, forense de datos y protocolos adaptativos que previenen fraude, suplantación de identidad y copias
 
* Eficaz: Incluye una entrevista adaptativa para validar las habilidades lingüísticas del candidato

Esperamos que puedan acompañarnos (http://go.duolingo.com/e/208162/meetings-DET/5x8cs/180063273)  en nuestra misión de hacer la educación más accesible para todos. ¡Nos vemos pronto en Los Angeles!

Saludos,
Luis Von Ahn, CEO

Aceptado por universidades prestigiosas (http://go.duolingo.com/e/208162/edu/5x8cn/180063273)

¡Solicita un demo gratis ahora! (http://go.duolingo.com/e/208162/Request-Trial/5x8cv/180063273)

Lee la investigación (http://go.duolingo.com/e/208162/pers-other-ye-testcenter14-pdf/5x8cz/180063273)

Copyright © 2017 Duolingo, All rights reserved.
We are sending this special invitation to attendees of the NAFSA 2017 conference in LA.

Thibault Rosa =)

tickets.subject: Feedback
tickets.description:
Hello,


I have become very frustrated with the Health system of learning new lessons. The only thing that this new system has done for me is make me stop using Duolingo. I am using the app to learn a language, not wait for my health to refill so I can practice another skill. So far the Health system has only slowed down my progress and discouraged me from using the app. I hope that the Duolingo team reconsiders the addition of this feature to the app. In my opinion, it makes the language learning process much more difficult and frustrating. Thank you for your consideration.

tickets.subject: Lesson degrading way too fast
tickets.description:
Hello,
I have been learning German with Duolingo for 2 weeks now and I can't help but think that lessons are degrading way too fast. Every evening when I start practicing, there are more than 10 degraded lessons. I understand that it is useful to remember the words, but the lessons are almost the same everytime, so it doesn't really help.
I have seen threads about this issue, and usually a Duolingo moderator said that it should be resolved now. But obviously, this is not the cas, at least not for everyone.
Can you please look into this ?

Other than that, a little feedback :
I think Duolingo is not always serving its purpose correctly, because it is made like a "challenging game" where people don't have a say in anything, because that would be "cheating".
However, the purpose of Duolingo is to help people learn. I think users should have a bit more power other their learning.
The most obvious reason for me is that Duolingo often makes mistakes when evaluating answers (especially in the user's native language), either because it doesn't accept an answer that means the same thing as the "correct" one, or because it doesn't identify typos correctly. Therefore I think users should be able to say "This is what I meant" (or something similar) to tell Duolingo that their answer is still correct, even though it wasn't accepted. That way they could avoid having to answer twice the same question because Duolingo "punished" the "mistake".
Thank you for reading my feedback, and I hope you will consider adding this feature.

Best regards
Nicolas

tickets.subject: "Merhaba, sizin programınız vasıtasıyla İngilizce ...
tickets.description:
"Merhaba, sizin programınız vasıtasıyla İngilizce öğrenmeye çalışıyorum. Pratik yaparken dikkatimi en çok çeken şey şu oldu: Program çok az İngilizce cümle kurduruyor! Neden? Bir denge olması gerekmez mi? Ben bu sistemde tüm programı bitirsem de ne cümle kurabileceğime, ne de akıcı konuşabileceğime inanmıyorum. %44 akıcı olduğum bildiriliyor. Evet akan bir şeyler var ama bu kesinlikle ben değilim. Umarım bu akışa bir gün bende eşlik edebilirim. Yine de sanki öğrenebilirmişim hissi verdiği için size ve programınıza çok teşekkür ederim. Son olarak, insanlara ücretsiz ikinci bir dil öğrenme imkanı sağlıyorsunuz; bu çok değerli bir şey. Sizin niyetiniz İngilizce'den çok daha önemli ve değerlidir. Benim için yaşamdaki tek başarı kriteri mutluluktur. Geride kalan her şey, ''so so'' dir. Sakin ve huzurlu günler dilerim. Teşekkürler... 

------------------
Nereden gönderildiği: https://www.duolingo.com/help

tickets.subject: Sugerencias
tickets.description:
Unidad negocios. Refuerza. Ejercicio : Traduce esta oración.
Hai abbastanza credito?
Traducción obligatoria: ¿Tenés bastante crédito?    ???
Esta traducción no es castellana. En español el verbo tener en el tiempo presente del modo indicativo se conjuga de la siguiente manera: Yo tengo, " tú tienes" , él tiene, ella tiene, nosotros/as  tenemos , vosotros/as tenéis, ellos/as  tienen. Por lo tanto la traducción correcta es: ¿ Tienes bastante crédito? . Cualquier otra traducción podría ser un modismo o una jerga local.
Gracias.



Username: 39oretta
App version: 5.0.11
Device model: iPad
OS version: 9.3.5
UI language: es
Learning language: it

tickets.subject: Sugerencias
tickets.description:
Verbos. Condicional Perfecto.

Me parece que no es correcto ofrecer argentinismos u otras jergas sin dar alternativa a quién desea aprender o practicar un castellano no local. No creo sea tan difícil agregar un " tú" a la propuesta de vos, o" comáis " al comás , etc. No dar alternativa no es instructivo y es prevaricador, no digno de Duolingo. Por otro lado si alguien desea prepararse para ir a Argentina es justo que encuentre el modo de conocer los modismos locales. Yo los pondría ambos para que cada cuál pueda escoger cómo formar su oración, y admitiría ambas como correctas.
Muchas gracias.

tickets.description:
I'm sorry but I hate this new gamified gems duolingo. It's awful and I'm demotivated to learn. I'm checking out MemRise now.

Other feedback: duolingo still can't understand the notion of learning multiple languages. Goals are still global not language specific. Instead of messing around with gems and more and more and more ads, just make this a better platform for learning language!

tickets.subject: Feedback
tickets.description:
Your newly added "health" feature does nothing toward enhancing 
 the learning process. Rather, i find it is a hinderance and source of frustration. Your daily reminder encourages taking "5 minutes" to complete a lesson.However, running out of "health" results in not finishing at all. I am not about to pay to have a lesson resumed ,nor do I feel that  I need to go to an entirely different lesson to "practice".
Additionally, the audio reception does not function properly when my voice is hoarse or even when there is a cough after the dictation, or loud noise in the background. This is especially galling to then also receive  a "health " demerit. Also, typos that do not represent an actual error in comprehension or translation become  a big issue.
I enjoyed your app and felt I was making good progress toward regaining the language I studied in school many years ago but with the addition of the "health" and related hassle, I am feeling more and more like returning to my old textbooks.
Thank you for your consideration.
Username: WoodyCook
App version: 5.1.0.18
Device model: iPad
OS version: 10.3.2
UI language: en
Learning language: de

tickets.subject: Unable to add friend/follow friend
tickets.description:
Hello,

Another user, DBushhouse, has sent me a friend request and I would like to add him as a friend. I press follow and add friend, though each time I log back in, it says that we are not friends and gives me the option to follow/add him again. I'm unsure of what to do, as I've tried this several times and it brings me back to square one again. It shows I am his friend, though it doesn't allow me to friend him. Please help, if possible! I've tried this on web and mobile and keep running into the same issue on both platforms.

tickets.subject: Android feedback
tickets.description:
Once I hit 29%, it was like the app decided I shouldn't progress.  It un-gold's sections to review, faster than I can complete them.  I've only ever had time for 2 to 4 lessons a day.  However now it is providing new sections and doing the review sections 4 to 8 at a time. For instance,  when the line with the 3 new sections: adjetives3, prepositions2, and places had been opened up, it created 23 new lessons to work through.  Yet at the same time each day it would request I review  an additional 3 to 4 old lessons. It took me nearly 2 weeks to work through that set, and that was with a couple of days devoted solely to trying to appease the review monster.  It was very discouraging & considering that spot was where I gave up the first time I tried duo, I really had to push to not give up. It is still doing the excessive reviews & I've not made any significant progress for quite some  time. I work & have 2 kids & a small farm I simply don't have time to do 6 oe more lessons a day, but if I don't it'll have everything un-golded in about a weeks time. Discouraged & ready to give up again. 

-------------------

tickets.subject: Discussion Threads are Now Dead Ends
tickets.raw_subject: Discussion Threads are Now Dead Ends
tickets.description: One can no longer return to the lesson they were working on if they stop to view a discussion... I thought it was a fluke, but I tried this theory out several times. If I am working on a lesson, and view the discussion related to the question, there is no way to return to the lesson anymore. You must exit out to the home screen and start your lesson all over again. Not very cool if you are on question 17 when you decide you want to learn about it. Then you find out you have to begin the whole lesson over. Please fix this. Also, I like the way things looked before the change.

tickets.subject: potential financial scammer on Duolingo
tickets.description:
Hello,

I recently emailed in about someone offering their Duolingo account for sale. (Reference code: 782681). I hadn't had time to do much thinking about it. I just wanted to get that bit in to you while I gathered more information about  the situation.

I have since noticed that this person used scripting to gain an enormous number of levels and lingots. The account has an 899 day streak. I've never seen this account before now but, maybe they aren't active in the forums. Regardless, it just seemed odd that F3j was being secretive about why they were deactivating their account. 

Add to that they are trying to sell the account, it's raised some red flags for me. At the very least, they are using Duolingo to make money. At the worst, I thought maybe they would try to scam people into given them bank account numbers or something.

I left a comment in the discussion telling people the account was violating some guidelines and using scripting and that people should protect their financial information. F3j immediately deactivated. (Please note, no mods have submitted a ban for F3j at this time.)

Any suggestions on how I should proceed aside from giving other mods a heads up to clear these posts and report them?

Thanks!

-Usagi

tickets.subject: Предложение о покупке вашего приложения Duolingo: Learn Languages Free
tickets.raw_subject: Предложение о покупке вашего приложения Duolingo: Learn Languages Free
tickets.description:
Добрый день!

Заинтересовало ваше приложение "Duolingo: Learn Languages Free" -  
https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.duolingo.
Если вы допускаете возможность его продажи, то нам было бы интересно  
обсудить условия покупки.

В случае вашей заинтересованности, для продолжения обсуждения, пришлите  
пож-та скриншоты статистики по данному приложению из Play Google по которым  
будет видно то какой объем новых установок/удалений идет последний год,  
также будет понятен текущий объем активной базы инсталляций и понятен объем  
и средняя оценка отзывов пользователей. Данные отчеты нужно видеть в  
разрезе географии, чтобы было понятно соотношение по странам.

Примеры нужных скриншотов статистики из Play Google в разрезе географии:

http://pix.my/ys8V1m - статистика установок за день на протяжении  
последнего года

http://pix.my/6HDd1T - статистика удалений за день на протяжении последнего  
года

http://pix.my/zeF4SN - статистика установок на активных устройствах на  
протяжении последнего года

http://pix.my/3dGOqX - статистика оценок и отзывов на протяжении месяца

В качестве технической информации требуется Манифест приложения и  
используемые для его разработки фреймворки.

Заранее спасибо!

               С уважением, Настя

tickets.subject: Здравствуйте! У меня вышла такая неприятность. 23....
tickets.raw_subject: Здравствуйте! У меня вышла такая неприятность. 23....
tickets.description:
Здравствуйте! У меня вышла такая неприятность. 23.05 я был вдали от дома и занимался Дуолинго по мобильному интернету от Мегафона. У меня на 22.05 было 263 дня ударного режима. Я в обеденное время зашел в программу и сделал два урока повторения французского в программе. При этом программа в онлайн режиме засчитала уроки и выставила 264 дня ударного режима. Каково же было мое крайнее удивление, когда 24.05, открыв программу французского на Дуолинго я обнаружил, что я вылетел из ударного режима. А программа на планшете предложила восстановить Ударный режим за определенную сумму денег. Ребята, но это не честно! Обидно, что программа сперва засчитала 23.05 мне 264 дня ударного режима, а 24.05 предъявила мне, что мой ударный режим сгорел, так как я якобы 23.05 вообще не работал с программой. Конечно же, я продолжу заниматься в этой программе, так как мне очень нравится практиковаться в языке по этой программе, но, блин, обидно, когда с тебя по непонятной причине  сбрасывают твои честно заработанные "виртуальные плюшки"

------------------
Отправлено с https://www.duolingo.com/help

Why are you hiding the button to unsub so well? This is kinda aggravating. Your Update made the app useless for me and now I can't unsub without deleting my account? You should change that.... tickets.subject: Bug Report
tickets.description:
Hi, I am using Duolingo French on the Mobile phone App - I have an IPhone 5. There is an error and now I can’t get past that point.
What should I do to continue as it just keeps making me re-do the same question, and the answer that I provide is the exact same answer as the solution that comes up.

The answer is "the boys’ dogs” and it is the only solution possible and it is also the answer which I provide.

Please advise who to contact or how to get this resolved.
Thank you
Regards

E Carlean

tickets.subject: Ранее на данную эл.почту я зарегистрировала свою м...
tickets.raw_subject: Ранее на данную эл.почту я зарегистрировала свою м...
tickets.description:
Ранее на данную эл.почту я зарегистрировала свою маму,чтобы она проходила курс английского языка. 
Теперь ей это не нужно, а я сама хочу учиться с Дуо.
Я прошла тесты по англ.и испанскому и прошла несколько уроков,но теперь требуется создание профиля. Я хочу создать профиль на свою почту, для этого мне нужно удалить прошлый аккаунт, т.к. система пишет, что такой почтовый адрес уже заоегистрирован. На вашем сайте кнопка Отключить аккаунт не работает-пробовала несколько раз-аккаунт не удаляется.

------------------
Отправлено с https://www.duolingo.com/help

Hi,

I have 2 issues:

One is that my next lessons are locked. Why? How can I unlock?

The second one is that the system wants me to pay money for the "missed streak", despite the fact I actually made a lesson yesterday. So it certainly is bug...it's not the first time it happened. Please help me and allow me to continue my 100+ streak :)

Proper screenshots attached.

Regards,

Maciek

In some of the lessons I am doing, as well as strengthening, when the question is choose one of the 3/4 options that matches what the speaker says, the correct solution is not accepted, and neither are the other wrong options. Why are you using an American flag for the ENGLISH language? Also, why the Brazilian flag for Portuguese? English is from England. The evolution of the language, Beowulf, Chaucer, Shakespeare, all occurred in England, so why give our language away to the USA? The story of England and he story of English are the same, the Norman invasion affected both equally. America wasn't there when the language was born, it's not the parent. Is it because they have a larger population? Because they made Star Wars? It would be just as wrong to show an Australian flag for the English language.

tickets.subject: Android feedback
tickets.description:
-------------------

App information:

App version code: 3.48.0 googleAllcourses

API Level: 23

OS Version: 3.18.24-perf-g798c6bf (V8.2.5.0.MCFMIDL)

Host (Device): mi-server (mido)

Model (Product): Redmi Note 4 (mido)

Screen: 1080x1920, 480dpi

Config: Internal, 192 | 192

Username: NithinDas

Languages: de<-en : en : en_IN

-------------------

Whenever we are asked to speak into the microphone, the audio playback should be disabled.

It only makes sense this way, because I am able to tap the mic and then tap the speaker symbol so that the app can say the words out for me. This is way to easy. If I really want to learn, I will not do it this way, however if we are to use this as a benchmark to measure a person's hold on a language, such loopholes need to be covered. Reference image attached : *193524.jpg

Also if that isn't a loophole and is a legit feature, I would like to know what purpose it serves.

When we are asked to translate a sentence, the first letter of the first word of the sentence is in uppercase, which makes it really easy for users to breeze through that task or challenge.

Reference image is *193224.jpg.

Please keep me informed.

Regards ,

Nithin S Das

tickets.subject: DUO DOES NOT BEHAVE PROPERLY
tickets.description:
When I try to enter the Topic "Questions" in the German course, I do not get the usual sequence of questions, but I get a Chrome advertisement on the right, and on the left an open line flanked by the words "Strength NaN/5" and "Strengthen".  When I push the "Strenghten" option I end up in the French course!
Sometimes I can enter the topic, but when I have finished the sequence of questions, I do not get the second fanfare - and this happens not as usual once in a while, but systematically all  the time. And the colour filling the Topic circle is still there, and on the right field i have not been credited either. 
But when I log out and log in again, things are as they should be. Quite annoying.
But otherwise, thanks to everyone at Duo for excellent courses.

tickets.subject: Android feedback
tickets.description:
To Whom It May Concern,

When I originally downloaded your free version program I greatly enjoyed it, so much so that I added a few languages.  Unfortunately, this recent update has a feature that has drained out much of the fun...the fact that when you make a mistake the progress bar decreases.  Now I have to work much harder to gain the same proverbial ground.  This has added unnecessary stress to what was once a fun program.  Put another way, before the bar began decreasing if I made a mistake it was simply a mistake.  Now if I make a mistake I have to get two more right to regain ground.  This takes up all of the prescious little time I have to dedicate to this program.

I could understand such aggressive tactics for a program I am paying money for, but not for a free version.  Please remove this feature.

Brian Holt

-------------------

tickets.subject: Duolingo + Snapchat
tickets.description:
Hi Luis,

Hope you are doing well and had a great memorial day weekend.

As a big fan and user of Duolingo, I wanted to reach out and introduce myself as Duolingo's point of contact here at Snapchat.  I want to chat with you as we've seen great success in this space and would love to share some ideas and all the great things we are working on at Snap.

Would love to set up a time to chat with you and/or anyone else from your team that helps lead your growth and acquisition efforts in driving app installs and brand awareness.

Please let me know if you're interested and we can set up a time.  Do you have any availability this week to chat?  

Andrew


--

Andrew Nassery 

Snapchat Business Specialist

Snapchat | (424) 543-2503

Snap Inc. | 64 Market Street, Venice, California 90291

tickets.subject: Duolingo: Learn Languages Free
tickets.description:
Hi!
I'm doing your Spanish course and think it's absolutely excellent! 
But I want to report a glitch. I was too late doing my homework one day and wanted to pay to keep my streak. Although it was just about midnight so by the time the payment went through it was the next day. I got an error message and my streak was set to zero. Bummer I thought,  but it was my own fault.
So I was very surprised when I realised I had been charged anyway! 
No biggie for this time, but you might want to look into it.

Keep up the good work!

Hilsen Terese Svenke
tlf 90954056

Sendt fra min Xperia Z5 "Quicksilver"
